description: Capability for the main window. Grants core APIs + event listen, shell open, and the app's OWN IPC commands (open_external / apply_incremental_update via the allow-ipc permission). CRITICAL: the wiki is served over http://127.0.0.1:<random-port> by tiny_http and the webview navigates there, so its IPC origin is REMOTE, not Local. A capability with only `local: true` grants NOTHING to a remote origin (Origin::matches returns false for (Remote, Local)). The `remote.urls` patterns below extend every permission here to the localhost http origin — without them ALL IPC (external links AND the updater) is rejected with 'not allowed by ACL'. Port is random each launch, so the port component must be the wildcard `*`.
